title: NH Validator Dataset Envelope (Stage A input contract)
description: Input contract for the Stage A deterministic validator. It ONLY groups arrays of existing NH-ROP schema-conformant objects plus validator execution metadata. It adds NO business meaning; every element is validated against its existing research/schemas/*.schema.json. This envelope is a validator I/O contract, not an NH research object model. NOTE: the $ref links below are documentation for readers; the Stage A subset-validator does not resolve $ref (unsupported keyword) — it validates each array element against the correspondingly-loaded NH-ROP schema by type.
